notes: ## [1.9.8] - 2026-07-05  ### Fixed - **GitHub Release Assets**: Changed `productName` from `"League Profile Tool"` (with spaces) to `"League-Profile-Tool"` (with hyphens) in `tauri.conf.json` so that the Tauri bundler produces filenames that match the paths expected by the CI release action. Previously, assets were built but silently skipped during upload, resulting in an empty release.  ### Changed - **Updater URLs**: Updated download URL patterns in the CI workflow to use the new hyphenated name, ensuring the auto-updater can locate the correct release assets.
